name: Mad Malts Brewing
content: Mad Malts is a brewery, bar, and events space. The staff is friendly and the shows are fun. I am 90% sure there is somebody who cooks meth in the neighborhood where Mad Malts is located, although everyone else in the neighborhood seems pretty chill. Everyone I know who has been to Mad Malts has either seen someone get kicked in the face, or has been kicked in the face themselves at Mad Malts. This is not the fault of Mad Malts staff or the bands playing, rather, it is the fault of the three dimwits who think a mosh pit means doing roundhouse kicks while everyone else tries to press against the walls and avoid the high-speed face-level footwear. The garden area is pleasant and free of appendages in places they ought not to be.
